questions.title: Print 1 to 10
questions.description: Write a program that prints the numbers from 1 to 10 in ascending order.

questions.title: Multiplication Table of 5
questions.description: Write a program that prints the multiplication table of 5 up to 10 terms.

questions.title: Last Character of Dishant
questions.description: Write a program that takes the string "Dishant" as input and prints its last character.

questions.title: Count Elements in Array
questions.description: Write a program that takes an array of integers as input and prints the total number of elements.

questions.title: Check Strings Equal
questions.description: Write a program that takes two strings as input and checks whether they are equal or not.

questions.title: Sum of Digits
questions.description: Write a program that takes an integer as input and prints the sum of its digits.

questions.title: Reverse Number
questions.description: Write a program that takes an integer as input and prints its reverse.

questions.title: Swap Two Numbers
questions.description: Write a program that takes two integers as input and swaps their values.

questions.title: 4x4 Star Pattern
questions.description: Write a program to print a 4×4 square pattern using *.

questions.title: Factorial
questions.description: Write a program that takes a non-negative integer as input and prints its factorial.

questions.title: Print Factors
questions.description: Write a program that takes an integer as input and prints all of its factors.

questions.title: Palindrome Number
questions.description: Write a program that takes an integer as input and checks whether it is a palindrome or not.

questions.title: Simple Interest
questions.description: Write a program that takes principal, rate, and time as input and calculates simple interest.

questions.title: Greatest of Three
questions.description: Write a program that takes three integers as input and prints the greatest among them.

questions.title: Armstrong Number
questions.description: Write a program that takes an integer as input and checks whether it is an Armstrong number or not.

questions.title: Neon Number
questions.description: Write a program that takes an integer as input and checks whether it is a Neon number or not.

questions.title: Harshad Number
questions.description: Write a program that takes an integer as input and checks whether it is a Harshad (Niven) number or not.

questions.title: Second Largest Element
questions.description: Write a program that takes an array of integers and finds the second largest element.

questions.title: Remove Duplicates
questions.description: Write a program that removes duplicate elements from an array and prints the result.

questions.title: Rotate Array
questions.description: Write a program that rotates an array by k positions.

questions.title: Reverse Words in String
questions.description: Write a program that takes a string as input and reverses the order of words.

questions.title: Skip Every 4th Alphabet
questions.description: Print all lowercase alphabets from a to z, but skip every 4th character.

examples.output: a b c e f g i j k m n o q r s u v w y z

questions.title: Most Frequent Character
questions.description: Given a string s, print the character that appears the most number of times.

questions.title: Print 1 to N using Recursion
questions.description: Given an integer N, print numbers from 1 to N using recursion.

questions.title: Min Removal for Palindrome
questions.description: Given a string s, find the minimum number of characters to remove to make it a palindrome.
